title: Order Placement and Payment

actors.name: Customer
actors.description: Logged-in user who places orders, makes payment, and tracks shipment

actors.name: Admin
actors.description: Staff user who views all orders and ships items

actors.name: Email System
actors.description: External SMTP (smtp.gmail.com:587) used to deliver transactional emails via JavaMailUtil

use_cases.name: Place Order / Complete Payment
flow: OrderServlet validates session (userName, password); redirects to login.jsp if null
CartServiceImpl.getAllCartItems(userName) — returns cart items; aborts if empty
OrderServiceImpl.addOrder(OrderBean) → INSERT into orders (transactionId, prodId, qty, amount, shipped=0)
After all items: OrderServiceImpl.addTransaction(TransactionBean) → INSERT into transactions
Returns 'Order Placed Successfully!' or 'Order Placement Failed!'

use_cases.name: View Order History
methods: OrderServiceImpl.getAllOrderDetails(userEmailId) — JOIN orders + product + transactions, returns OrderDetails with prodId, name, image, qty, amount, time, shipped

use_cases.name: Ship Order
flow: ShipmentServlet validates session (usertype); redirects to login.jsp if null
UPDATE orders SET shipped=1 WHERE orderid=? AND prodid=? AND shipped=0
On SUCCESS: MailMessage.orderShipped(userName, UserServiceImpl.getFName(userName), orderId, amount)

use_cases.name: Receive Shipment Notification Email
flow: Subject: 'Hurray!!, Your Order has been Shipped from Ellison Electronics'

use_cases.name: View All Orders
methods: OrderServiceImpl.getAllOrders() — SELECT * FROM orders, returns List<OrderBean> with shipped flag

use_cases.name: Look Up Transaction Owner
methods: TransServiceImpl.getUserId(transId) — SELECT username FROM transactions WHERE transid=?

include_relationships: UC1 includes UC3 (send payment confirmation email on success)
UC4 includes UC5 (send shipment email on success)
UC1 includes Validate Session (OrderServlet session guard)
UC4 includes Validate Admin Session (ShipmentServlet session guard)
extend_relationships: UC3 extends Email System (via JavaMailUtil SMTP)
UC5 extends Email System (via JavaMailUtil SMTP)
key_classes: OrderServiceImpl implements OrderService — paymentSuccess(), addOrder(), addTransaction(), shipNow(), getAllOrders(), getOrdersByUserId(), getAllOrderDetails(), countSoldItem()
MailMessage — static helper: transactionSuccess(), orderShipped(), registrationSuccess(), productAvailableNow(), sendMessage()
JavaMailUtil — static sendMail(recipient) and sendMail(recipient, subject, htmlBody) via Jakarta Mail / SMTP
key_relationships: OrderServiceImpl depends_on CartServiceImpl, ProductServiceImpl, UserServiceImpl, DBUtil, MailMessage
important_notes: Session check is critical gating condition: Customers need username+password in session for OrderServlet; Admins need usertype in session for ShipmentServlet. All DB ops go through DBUtil.provideConnection(). TransServiceImpl is a simple lookup service used to resolve transaction owner. MailMessage.orderShipped is called from ShipmentServlet (not OrderServiceImpl). SMTP credentials loaded from application.properties ResourceBundle.
